name: Baked Beans Like Boston Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Dried Onions (reconstituted in 1/4 cup hot water for 5 minutes)
1/2 cup Open Pit Hickory Flavored BBQ Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. While the onions are softening, empty a jar of northern beans into a 4-quart baking dish or pan.
2. Add pork and beans to the northern beans in the baking dish.
3. Stir in the onion mixture, ketchup, and BBQ sauce.
4. Bake uncovered at 350°F for about 30-35 minutes, stirring 2-3 times during baking.
5. Refrigerate covered for up to one week or freeze for up to four months.
